overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, moving through a futuristic industrial prison facility. The player traverses ground-level cell blocks, ascends stairs, and rises vertically through a towering central structure with holographic displays and illuminated cell windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor cell block with storage pallets

events.description: approaching and beginning to ascend concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through industrial cell block area toward central staircase

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with illuminated cell windows rising vertically
large vertical blue glowing waterfall-like holographic projection
wide concrete staircase leading to upper level
stacked wooden pallets and construction materials
industrial metal storage crates and containers
yellow and white painted text on floor reading CELL BLOCK

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on the ground floor of a futuristic industrial prison facility. The camera moves forward through a concrete corridor marked with CELL BLOCK signage, passing wooden pallets and metal crates. Ahead, a massive illuminated tower rises, with a blue holographic waterfall display glowing on the right side.

events.description: ascending from ground floor to upper level via concrete stairs
approaching brighter area near blue holographic display

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and proceeding along upper walkway past security equipment

entered.detail: desk with monitors and security equipment
black metal safety railing along walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the concrete stairs to an upper security level. The ground floor elements fall behind as a security console and metal railings come into view. The central tower and blue holographic display grow larger and closer as the camera moves forward.

events.description: approaching central void with vertical light beam visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway toward central tower structure

entered.detail: metal grating walkway extending toward central tower
yellow painted safety lines on concrete floor

segments.scene_description: Moving along the elevated walkway, the camera approaches the massive central tower. The security console is left behind as metal bridge structures and yellow safety markings appear. The blue holographic display is now prominent on the right, and the tower fills the forward view.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical prison tower shaft with multiple cell levels

events.description: beginning rapid vertical ascent through central tower structure
passing under horizontal metal support beams

agents.ego_description: rising vertically through the central tower shaft, observing cell blocks on multiple levels

entered.detail: horizontal steel support beams crossing the vertical shaft
multiple levels of prison cell balconies visible on sides of shaft
bright vertical beam of light emanating from top of tower

segments.scene_description: The camera rises rapidly through the central tower's vertical shaft, passing under metal support beams. Cell block balconies become visible on multiple levels to the left and right. The blue holographic display recedes into the distance as the camera ascends toward a bright vertical light beam at the top of the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins on the ground floor of a futuristic industrial prison and ascends vertically through a towering central structure. It begins by moving forward through a concrete corridor past wooden pallets and metal crates, heading toward a massive tower featuring a glowing blue holographic waterfall. As the camera climbs concrete stairs to an upper security level, the ground floor recedes and the holographic display grows larger and more prominent. The scene then shifts along an elevated walkway past security consoles and yellow safety markings before the camera rises rapidly through the tower's vertical shaft. Passing under metal support beams and alongside multi-level cell balconies, the camera finally ascends toward a bright vertical light beam at the top of the structure as the holographic display recedes below.
